programme.title: Timeless Memories - EP 6 / 业落夕阳
programme.desc: It turns out that Hannah was bribed by Zhiyuan to force Haoyu to sell the shop. When Hannah switches sides and helps Haoyu save the shop, a furious Zhiyuan exposes her as his mole. Haoyu is immensely disappointed in Hannah who deeply regrets her actions. Haoyu implements extensive changes, breathing new life into the bookshop. He passes the mirror to the son of a kacang puteh stall owner.

programme.title: Talk of The Town - EP 12 / 狮城热话
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Incorporating online polls which gather public opinions, the segment creates a space that allows for multi viewpoints in the studio from Monday to Friday.

programme.title: Kowloon My City - EP 6 / 我爱九龙城
programme.desc: Sanyuan invites Baoyan to join a dinner with Jialin and Junji and deliberately makes remarks that embarrass Jialin. Noticing her discomfort, Junji goes to the mahjong parlour the next day to have a proper talk with Sanyuan.

programme.title: Taste of Life - EP 1064 / 甘味人生
programme.desc: Chu-Tsai, Chao and his wife have five children. Devoted all his life into developing soy sauce products, Chu-Tsai very much hopes that one of his kids can follow his footsteps and take over his business, but he also respects their own passions and aspirations. Because of their father's invention dream, the Chao brother's lives are about to change.

programme.title: No Return - EP 9 / 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: Guichan’s mother begs Shiqi for help but he has no leads. The captor, a mysterious old man, knows Guichan’s past and plans to imprison her for twelve years.

programme.title: No Return - EP 10 / 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: Shiqi changes tactics, turning the ransom into a reward. Meanwhile, Huaxiang grows suspicious as clues suggest Weihao and his associates might be behind Guichan’s kidnapping.

programme.title: Golden City - EP 463 / 多情城市
programme.desc: This drama is set in the Jiufen area from the 1960s to the 1970s. It tells the story of how three brothers conquered the world with their bare hands. Through the love story of the previous generation, it connects the common emotions between the two generations depicting the memories and in-depth exploration of the differences in values between them.

programme.title: Golden City - EP 464 / 多情城市

programme.title: Kowloon My City - EP 7 / 我爱九龙城
programme.desc: After learning that Sanfei plans to borrow money from Wanjun, Sanxi loses his temper and openly confronts him in front of Sanyuan, leading to a scuffle among the three brothers. In the end, they each reveal the secrets they had long kept hidden from one another.

programme.title: Hustle or Bustle - EP 6 / 你来工作我来玩
programme.desc: Alishan in Chiayi, Taiwan, is a famous destination known for its forest railway. The train climbs from 30m at Chiayi to 2,216m at Alishan, offering stunning views. One host enjoys the ride and explores Tsou indigenous culture, while the other joins railway work from dawn. Who works and who plays?

programme.title: Timeless Memories - EP 7 / 业落夕阳
programme.desc: Ramesh wants to take over his father’s kacang puteh stall. His girlfriend Ashley pretends to be supportive but privately asks Krish to dissuade his son. When the furious Krish is hospitalised from a stroke, Ramesh steps in to run the business, only to realise it’s harder than imagined. By chance, he sees in the mirror his grandfather hawking in his youth and the process of making kacang puteh.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight / 晚间新闻

programme.title: Focus - EP 3 / 焦点

programme.desc: Mr. Krabs uses Sandy's experimental growth formula on a Krabby Patty with disastrous results; SpongeBob creates a buddy out of bubbles when none of his friends have time to play with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, SpongeBob and Patrick try to prove their life insurance protects them from any danger; when SpongeBob blows himself a bubble boat, everyone in town starts to want one.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs makes a wish that he could talk to money; SpongeBob competes against a patty-making machine; Squidward trains SpongeBob for a dance contest.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob is challenged by E.V.I.L. to make a delivery to their secret lair in 10 minutes or less; when Mr. Krabs gets trapped inside Pearl's new boat, he must pretend to be its engine to avoid being caught.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton builds a coliseum and holds a gladiator show; SpongeBob and Patrick keep Squidward from concentrating on his music.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes it his mission to become normal; SpongeBob wakes to find that everyone in Bikini Bottom is gone.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: After arriving one minute late for work, SpongeBob decides to move into the Krusty Krab so that he will never be late again; when Plankton secretly turns down the thermostat at the Krusty Krab the entire restaurant freezes over.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When a prehistoric sponge is unfrozen, he causes chaos all over town and only SpongeBob can communicate with him; when a flock of clams descends on Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob has to get them out before they ruin the whole town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton wins the cutest baby contest and becomes the face of a baby food brand; when Squidward's one-off portrait of SpongeBob takes the art world by storm, he has no choice but to produce more.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Lady Upturn becomes Squidward's patron and introduces his music to her rich friends; Squidward tries to disprove aliens until he has a close encounter with one.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob learn to tie their shoes; Squidward is in charge of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton steals Sandy's pelt to impersonate her; Plankton tries to launch himself into Mr. Krabs' head and misses his target.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When Mr. Krabs gets in trouble for littering, he makes SpongeBob and Squidward clean up Bikini Bottom; a sea bunny ravages Squidward's garden, but SpongeBob thinks it's cute.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take a friendship test; Pearl is embarrassed when she has to sit next to SpongeBob in the Tunnel of Glove.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wants to throw a birthday party for Pearl; SpongeBob receives an invitation to take part in a competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a pool in his backyard, and Squidward tries to resist taking a dip; Mr. Krabs must reckon with the Goobfather after he adds patty whips to the menu.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Two familiar faces from SpongeBob's past visit; Plankton finds an unlikely ally in the sewers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick befriends a sea monster that has wandered into Bikini Bottom; SpongeBob and Squidward search for answers when things begin to disappear from Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: A bicycling accident leaves Squidward coated in mud and leaves; SpongeBob tries to impress Squidward with his new magic kit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob is desperate to meet his newest hero, Kenny the Cat; Mr. Krabs tries to scare Squidward into working harder.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets embarrassed when his grandmother kisses him in public; Squidward leaves Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob must protect the town from a ferocious biker gang; Mr. Krabs and Plankton work together to infiltrate a new smoothie shop.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob must figure out how to do his job after accidentally shrinking himself; Squidward invents a new sport to get back at SpongeBob and Patrick for annoying him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob's breath smells after he eats sea onion ice cream; Mr. Krabs gives his daughter Pearl a job at Krusty Krab.

programme.title: Rock Paper Scissors
programme.desc: Paper and Pencil tell a kind of funny joke at a party and chase the feeling of people finding them funny by telling it again and again; Scissors hires an orchestra to follow him around and score his life.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton tells Patrick he's his conscience so he can convince the wooden-headed star to steal him a Krabby Patty; when Mr. Krabs puts in an open kitchen, SpongeBob gets stage fright and has to invent a new persona.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When SpongeBob thinks he has an allergy to his pineapple, Squidward offers to help find him a new home; Squidward gets a nose job at the local hospital and SpongeBob tags along as moral support.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick discovers that the rock he lives under is actually a sea turtle that overslept; old Man Jenkins disrupts business as usual at the Krusty Krab, but Mr. Krabs can't find a way to kick him out.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob finds a sea urchin living in the Krusty Krab; Squidward convinces SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs is forced to give out free food to win back customers; SpongeBob needs all of his friends to help him remodel his pineapple home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward closes the gap in SpongeBob's teeth, which causes a dramatic and unexpected change in his demeanor; the newly reformed Clean Bubble takes a dishwashing job at the Krusty Krab, where he is tempted by the grime.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Flying Dutchman enslaves SpongeBob and Pat onboard his ghost ship; Gary doesn't want to take a bath.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick becomes smart after he gets hit on the head; Sandy's experiment causes SpongeBob and Squidward to meld into one body.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Krusty Krab employees must work around the clock; Mr. Krabs sheds his shell right before the reunion with his old seafaring buddies.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick sneak into the Treedome; Gary follows Patrick around, and SpongeBob becomes jealous.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward is rushed to the hospital when SpongeBob accidentally slams the door on his face; the music that comes from the wind blowing through SpongeBob's holes attracts jellyfish.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

On Valentine's Day, a surprise marriage proposal goes awry with dangerous consequences; Athena attempts to help a desperate woman; Bobby and Chimney pull holiday duty; Abby and Buck go on their first official date.

The first responders race to rescue victims trapped in various tight spots; Athena contemplates accepting a promotion that will take her out of the field; Chimney finally deals with the aftermath of his near fatal car crash.

Maddie goes on a ride-along with Athena; Hen must figure out how to save her family from permanently falling apart; the first responders deal with emergencies both at a military funeral and a movie theater.

The first responders unwittingly become the subject of an eager reporter's first on-air assignment; Athena prepares for May's homecoming dance; the team responds to emergencies at an eating contest, a bodybuilding competition and a toddler pageant.

Halloween finds the first responders racing to the rescue at a cemetery, a haunted hayride and a spooky parade; Maddie thinks she has received a "ghost" call from a missing hiker; Hen is in a life-or-death situation with her father.

Buck jumps back into the dating scene but fears he will return to his old ways; a woman goes to great extremes on a freeway overpass to get the attention of her husband; a couple have a car accident on their wedding day.
Hen relives her evolution into the firefighter she is today as she recalls the first times she met Chimney and Athena.
